params.name: Dogbot Badge
params.description: This badge once belonged to a CyberVendorian Dogbot. These diesel-powered machines are rather underprivileged on their planet. They resented the Catbots for taking over too many resources and formed a resistance to fight them. The homeworld has almost been completely destroyed in the endless war.
